name: Sum of Subarray Ranges
category: Stack and Queues [Learning, Pre-In-Post-fix, Monotonic Stack, Implementation]
statement:
Given an integer array nums, determine the range of a subarray, defined as the difference between the largest and smallest elements within the subarray. Calculate and return the sum of all subarray ranges of nums.


A subarray is defined as a contiguous, non-empty sequence of elements within the array.

examples.explanation: The 6 subarrays of nums are the following: [1], range = largest - smallest = 1 - 1 = 0 [2], range = 2 - 2 = 0 [3], range = 3 - 3 = 0 [1,2], range = 2 - 1 = 1 [2,3], range = 3 - 2 = 1 [1,2,3], range = 3 - 1 = 2 So the sum of all ranges is 0 + 0 + 0 + 1 + 1 + 2 = 4.

The 6 subarrays of nums are the following: [1], range = largest - smallest = 1 - 1 = 0 [3], range = 3 - 3 = 0 [3], range = 3 - 3 = 0 [1,3], range = 3 - 1 = 2 [3,3], range = 3 - 3 = 0 [1,3,3], range = 3 - 1 = 2 So the sum of all ranges is 0 + 0 + 0 + 2 + 0 + 2 = 4.
